name: Your Grandmothers Favorite Stuffing
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the pork sausage in a medium skillet over medium heat and cook, breaking up pieces with a fork until no longer pink. Drain the excess fat.
2. In a large bowl, combine the cooked sausage, celery, onions, apples, walnuts, sage, parsley, oregano, thyme, salt, pepper, and bread cubes. Toss to mix well.
3. Combine the melted butter and boiling water in a small dish. Pour this mixture over the stuffing in the bowl. Gently toss to combine.
4. Spoon the stuffing into the cavities of the turkey just before roasting. Stuff loosely to allow for expansion.
5. If using leftover stuffing, bake at 375°F (190°C) for 35 to 40 minutes. Always remove all stuffing after the turkey is roasted.
